title: CreepyPasta Legends
description: Creepy Monsters awaken, Haunting players With Dark Legends and Fear.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8326275e047d970042df012aae5ae773dd5ce0b.png)
## Do you dare to face the dark side of Minecraft?

**This addon brings creepypasta legends to life and haunts your world with terrifying entities that will keep you on edge every moment you play.**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WSuzIaNRVZI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Note :
**[Geckolib Is Mandatory For This Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**

### Featured Entities:
**Herobrine – The legendary Entity of Minecraft returns to stalk you silently.**

![Herobrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca5cbcd38dc0473d4e0b12f1bc199c3497270c73_0.webp)

 **[Vll.r](https://minecraftcreepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Vll_r) – A mysterious and dangerous entity lurking in the shadows.**
![Vllr](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/minecraftcreepypasta/images/9/98/Vllr.png/revision/latest?cb=20180806031059)

**Screaming Sheep – You’ll know it when you hear it.**
 Head-Rotating Cow – Not everything in the pasture is friendly anymore...
 These aren’t just spooky textures – each entity has custom behaviors, jumpscares, and creepy surprises to make your survival experience horrifyingly unique.
 
![Sheep](https://modbay.org/uploads/posts/2025-04/minecraft-creepypasta-legends-screaming-sheep-screenshot.webp)
![Creepy Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3aa13a5ce66b22c9367d51225f60fe10c574836_0.webp)
